scripts.start: node ../../scripts/db-sync.js --auto && node scripts/use-env.js development && expo start
scripts.start:dev: node ../../scripts/db-sync.js --auto && node scripts/use-env.js development && expo start
scripts.android: node ../../scripts/db-sync.js --auto && node scripts/use-env.js development && expo start --android
scripts.ios: node ../../scripts/db-sync.js --auto && node scripts/use-env.js development && expo start --ios
scripts.web: node ../../scripts/db-sync.js --auto && node scripts/use-env.js development && expo start --web
scripts.build:web: node scripts/use-env.js development && expo export --platform web
scripts.build:web:prod: node scripts/use-env.js production && expo export --platform web
scripts.prebuild:android: node scripts/use-env.js development && npx expo prebuild --platform android
